description: A horizontal tab-strip that lets the user switch between a fixed set of mutually exclusive views or filters. Exactly one item is active at all times.

parts.description: Full-width rounded container that holds all segmented items. Carries the background color, border-radius, padding, and gap.
The currently selected tab. Has a light background, border, drop shadow, and dark text.
Any unselected tab. No background, no border, no shadow. Text is muted.

states.name: Active
states.description: The selected item. Has background, border, and shadow.

states.name: Inactive
states.description: Any unselected item. No background, no border, no shadow.

behavior.selectionModel: single — exactly one item active at all times
behavior.onChange: Controlled via onValueChange callback. Value is the index or label of the newly selected item.
behavior.defaultSelected: First item unless a default value is provided.
behavior.keyboard: TODO: Confirm arrow-key navigation between items.

realWorldUsage.description: Navs-2 variant used to switch between 'Pickup at' and 'Drop-off by' scheduling modes alongside a date/time picker. Track background is light (rgba(29,29,35,0.05)) in this context — differs from the dark DS Core track background.

notes: DS Core track background is dark (#1d1d23). Customer App uses a light semi-transparent track (rgba(29,29,35,0.05)). Token name alignment needed.
Items are equal-width and fill the track via flex: 1.
Typography is Inter Medium 500 15px — distinct from Manrope used in other Core components.
TODO: Confirm whether item labels support icons in addition to text.
TODO: Confirm keyboard arrow-key navigation behavior.
